description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, rpm, review, staging, and production using the dockregi.gioxa.com/c-build-tools/cent7build:latest Docker image for all compile jobs. In the build stage define a build job that runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make -j$(nproc), removes and recreates the output directory, copies scripts/*.sh and scripts/*.md into output, writes the output of git describe --tags --always --abbrev=8 to .GIT_VERSION, and publishes output/ and .GIT_VERSION as artifacts; also define a build_dist job that runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make dist, clears output, creates output/dist, moves deployctl*.tar.gz into it, and archives output as an artifact, depending on the same image. In the test stage add a coverage job that echoes a placeholder, runs ./docov, prepares an output folder with coverage data and a coverage.url file, always uploads output as an artifact, and a testing job that echoes a placeholder, runs ./autogen.sh, ./configure, make -j$(nproc) check, and always uploads tests/*.log as an artifact. In the rpm stage add an rpm job that echoes the current directory, sets up an rpmbuild tree, copies the tarball from output/dist, extracts the spec file, builds the RPM with rpmbuild using the current working directory as _topdir, moves the resulting RPMs into output/rpm, cleans up, depends on build_dist, and publishes output as an artifact. In the review stage create reviewb (runs on branches except tags and master) and reviewm (runs on master only) jobs that set review environments, run deployctl release (and deployctl repo_add for master), use the deployctl-gioxapp.com tag, and have matching stop_reviewb and stop_reviewm manual jobs that stop the environments. Finally, add Release_Staging and Release_production jobs in the staging and production stages that run deployctl release (and deployctl repo_add for production), target the appropriate staging and production URLs, trigger only on tags (production is manual), and use the deployctl-gioxapp.com tag.
